g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Riot Account-v1 and Summoner-v4 APIs')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Riot Match-v5 API and what data it returns')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Riot League-v4 API for ranked data')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Riot Spectator-v5 live game API')
sendPrompt('How should I build a rate-limited ingestion worker for the Riot API?')
g.text: Crawls top players → fetches match IDs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should I build a live game poller for the Riot Spectator API?')
g.text: Polls active games for pre-game overlay

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should my raw match data schema look like in PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('How do I store participants data from Riot match JSON efficiently?')
g.text: One row per player per match

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Write me SQL to compute winrate and pick rate per champion per role per patch')
sendPrompt('How do I compute the best item builds ranked by winrate from match data?')
sendPrompt('How do I compute matchup winrates, e.g. Aatrox vs Darius top lane?')
g.text: Champ A vs B WR% by lane

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should I use Redis to cache aggregated LoL stats for my API?')
sendPrompt('What REST API endpoints should I build for champion stats and builds like Mobalytics?')
sendPrompt('What does the Data Dragon static asset CDN provide for League of Legends?')
